row.label: second visitor/two days later/a new visit
second visitor/two days later/second page view😀💩😀💩
Second page view - should be registered as URL /
a new user id was set -> new visit
Another Product page with multiple categories
Another Product page with no category
incredible title! (Page URL contains a HTML entity)
Looking at Electronics & Cameras page again
Looking at Electronics & Cameras page with a page level custom variable
no User Id set but it should appear in email@example.com!
pageview - should not be tracked by our user id but in a new visit
same user id was set -> this is the same unique user
second pageview - by this user id
This is a pageview, not a Search - IS_FOLLOWING_SEARCH ONCE
This is tracked in a new visit.
